description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly green and metallic color scheme. Its torso is boxy with a flat, dark panel at the front, and it has two large, circular components on its back that resemble exhausts or drums. The arms are long and segmented, ending in pincer-like grippers, and are accented with gold and silver joints, suggesting a high degree of articulation. The legs are mechanical and jointed, with broad, flat feet for stability, and visible springs or shock absorbers at the knees. The head is minimalistic, with two round, dark elements that may serve as sensors or eyes, and a protective frame above. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical parts and a design suited for urban or industrial environments.
description: A green and metallic humanoid robot with articulated arms ending in pincers, a boxy torso, and mechanical legs with broad feet. It features exposed joints, dual circular components on its back, and a minimalistic head with sensor-like elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's symmetrical arms extended horizontally, boxy torso, and two round sensor-like features on the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the torso, the circular back components, and the layered structure of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals two large circular components on the back, the mechanical structure of the legs, and the arm joints.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the torso, back components, and articulated limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated metallic and plastic panels with visible mechanical joints and decorative gold accents.
attribute_facial_features: Minimalistic face with two round, dark sensor-like elements; no visible mouth or nose; lacks expressive features or display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints, allowing for a wide range of motion; hands are pincer-style grippers; limbs appear highly articulated and mechanical.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two round, dark elements on the head likely serve as visual sensors; no other sensors are visibly apparent.
